phases.name: Fix Registry Service 500 Error
phases.description: Fix the registry-service agent registration endpoint returning 500 instead of 201. Check services/registry-service/handlers.go for the RegisterAgent handler. Verify database connection in the agent creation logic and ensure required fields (agent_id, name, capabilities) are properly validated. Add error logging to identify the root cause. The test at tests/integration/api_test.go:512 expects 201. Run 'go test ./tests/integration/... -v -run TestRegistryServiceEndpoints' to verify.
success_criteria: go test ./tests/integration/... passes for registry tests

phases.name: Fix Job Service 400 Error
phases.description: Fix the job-service create job endpoint returning 400 instead of 201. Check services/job-service/handlers.go for the CreateJob handler. Verify the request validation is not incorrectly rejecting valid payloads - the test at tests/integration/api_test.go:686 sends a valid job request. Ensure document_id, printer_id, and options fields are properly parsed. Check for missing Content-Type handling or JSON unmarshaling issues. Run 'go test ./tests/integration/... -v -run TestJobServiceEndpoints' to verify.
success_criteria: go test ./tests/integration/... passes for job tests

phases.name: Fix Storage Service Metadata
phases.description: Fix the storage-service document metadata endpoint failing at tests/integration/api_test.go:839. Check services/storage-service/handlers.go for the GetDocumentMetadata handler. The test likely calls GET /documents/{id}/metadata after uploading a document. Verify the document ID path parameter extraction, ensure the storage backend returns proper metadata (size, content_type, uploaded_at), and handle the case where document exists but metadata retrieval fails. Add proper 404 vs 500 error distinction. Run 'go test ./tests/integration/... -v -run TestStorageServiceEndpoints' to verify.
success_criteria: go test ./tests/integration/... passes all storage tests

critical_issues: Registry service agent registration returns HTTP 500
Job service job creation returns HTTP 400

rationale: Tests are failing (Rule 2 priority). Build passes, so compilation is not the issue. Three specific integration test failures point to runtime bugs in registry, job, and storage services. Each task isolates one failing test to ensure single-call completion. Fixing in dependency order (registry → job → storage) as job creation may depend on registered agents and storage documents.
